---
title: "Nexis Uni"
page-layout: article
---

# Nexis Uni

## Description

Full-text news, business, legal, and company information database. Supports research using newspapers, magazines, transcripts, legal sources, and company profiles.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics, News & Media
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, News & Current Events, Data Platform

## Links

- [Access resource](http://hdl.handle.net/10079/yuldb/yuldb2398)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
